title: Death Forest 2
original_title: デスフォレスト 恐怖の森2
overview: A high school drama club has a training camp at an ex-school building near a dark forest. Troubled student Kizuki (Yuka Kuramochi) suddenly joins the drama club on the day they go to the training camp, but Kizuki doesn't take part in their practice.
